channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐ…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ
item.content:encoded:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ

item.title: More than a year after first trying to buy Infowars, The Oni…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: More than a year after first trying to buy Infowars, The Onion will debut a parody of under its own website with plans to give some of the revenue to families of the victims in the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting.
item.content:encoded: More than a year after first trying to buy Infowars, The Onion will debut a parody of under its own website with plans to give some of the revenue to families of the victims in the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting.

item.title: Sam Altman proposes a "US-led international forum" to establ…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Sam Altman proposes a "US-led international forum" to establish AI standards, provide analysis of capabilities and risks, and make AI available to allies (Sam Altman/Financial Times)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Sam Altman proposes a "US-led international forum" to establish AI standards, provide analysis of capabilities and risks, and make AI available to allies (Sam Altman/Financial Times)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink

item.title: 一七六七年春、京から大坂へ、若冲は盟友・大典とともに、舟旅に出た――。 琵琶湖、瀬田川、宇治川、淀川、大阪湾と淀川水系…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
一七六七年春、京から大坂へ、若冲は盟友・大典とともに、舟旅に出た――。

琵琶湖、瀬田川、宇治川、淀川、大阪湾と淀川水系を辿りながら、若冲と学僧・大典の友情、二人を取り結んだ元僧侶の売茶翁、芭蕉や富岡鉄斎とのつながり、さらに著者自身が若き日から親しんだ富岡多惠子、秋野不矩、西本願寺絵所十二代・徳力富吉郎らとの交流を振り返りながら、若冲という未だ謎の多い画家の実像に迫る意欲作。

黒川創
『若冲、川を下る』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
一七六七年春、京から大坂へ、若冲は盟友・大典とともに、舟旅に出た――。

琵琶湖、瀬田川、宇治川、淀川、大阪湾と淀川水系を辿りながら、若冲と学僧・大典の友情、二人を取り結んだ元僧侶の売茶翁、芭蕉や富岡鉄斎とのつながり、さらに著者自身が若き日から親しんだ富岡多惠子、秋野不矩、西本願寺絵所十二代・徳力富吉郎らとの交流を振り返りながら、若冲という未だ謎の多い画家の実像に迫る意欲作。

黒川創
『若冲、川を下る』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...

item.title: “These attempts to evade congressional oversight are unaccep…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: “These attempts to evade congressional oversight are unacceptable. The public deserves clear and consistent answers about ICE’s surveillance activities and its infringement of Americans’ civil liberties.”
item.content:encoded: “These attempts to evade congressional oversight are unacceptable. The public deserves clear and consistent answers about ICE’s surveillance activities and its infringement of Americans’ civil liberties.”

item.title: Nothing will wake you up faster in the middle of the night t…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description:
Nothing will wake you up faster in the middle of the night than the sound of a loud crash followed by the sound of tiny paws running away from the scene of the crime.

The criminal:
item.content:encoded:
Nothing will wake you up faster in the middle of the night than the sound of a loud crash followed by the sound of tiny paws running away from the scene of the crime.

The criminal:

item.title: The U.S. overall death rate in 2025 fell to its lowest point…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: The U.S. overall death rate in 2025 fell to its lowest point on record, even as influenza and pneumonia are now among the top 10 causes of death, according to new CDC data.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. overall death rate in 2025 fell to its lowest point on record, even as influenza and pneumonia are now among the top 10 causes of death, according to new CDC data.

item.title: I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally so…
item.author: New York Attorney General Letitia James (@newyorkstateag.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.
item.content:encoded:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.

item.title: GLM-5.2の開発元による中国製AIエージェントアプリ「ZCode」、AnthropicやOpenAIのAIモデルも活…
item.author: GIGAZINE (@gigazine.net)
item.description:
GLM-5.2の開発元による中国製AIエージェントアプリ「ZCode」、AnthropicやOpenAIのAIモデルも活用可能
https://gigazine.net/news/20260702-zcode-ai-agent/
item.content:encoded:
GLM-5.2の開発元による中国製AIエージェントアプリ「ZCode」、AnthropicやOpenAIのAIモデルも活用可能
https://gigazine.net/news/20260702-zcode-ai-agent/

item.title: 次の”獲物(ターゲット)”は、あなたかもしれない。トクリュウ犯罪のすべてを暴くクライム・サスペンス。 匿名・流動型犯罪…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
次の”獲物(ターゲット)”は、あなたかもしれない。トクリュウ犯罪のすべてを暴くクライム・サスペンス。

匿名・流動型犯罪、通称トクリュウ。宗教二世の受け子、次々と姿を消す指示役、守り役のヤクザ……躊躇なく弱者を踏みにじる「闇バイト」組織の面々を相手に、一粒の砂のような痕跡から執念の捜査で犯罪者を追う刑事たち。壮絶な逃走劇の果てに待ちうけるものとは――。警察小説、犯罪小説を超越した圧巻の≪人間小説≫。

黒川博行
『流砂』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
次の”獲物(ターゲット)”は、あなたかもしれない。トクリュウ犯罪のすべてを暴くクライム・サスペンス。

匿名・流動型犯罪、通称トクリュウ。宗教二世の受け子、次々と姿を消す指示役、守り役のヤクザ……躊躇なく弱者を踏みにじる「闇バイト」組織の面々を相手に、一粒の砂のような痕跡から執念の捜査で犯罪者を追う刑事たち。壮絶な逃走劇の果てに待ちうけるものとは――。警察小説、犯罪小説を超越した圧巻の≪人間小説≫。

黒川博行
『流砂』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...

item.title: Ehi chi ha spento la luce? Che scherzi del gatto sono, quest…
item.author: Zoalord Alkampfer (@zoalord74.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ehi chi ha spento la luce?

item.title: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about R…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: いま思い出す三重野康・元日銀総裁「バブル潰し」の決意 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO... …
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
いま思い出す三重野康・元日銀総裁「バブル潰し」の決意
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

日銀がインフレを止めるタイミングはいつか。

それは円安や物価高ではなく、住宅価格の高騰が思い切った利上げの引き金になる――。

マネックスグループのイェスパー・コール氏の寄稿です。
item.content:encoded:
いま思い出す三重野康・元日銀総裁「バブル潰し」の決意
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

日銀がインフレを止めるタイミングはいつか。

それは円安や物価高ではなく、住宅価格の高騰が思い切った利上げの引き金になる――。

マネックスグループのイェスパー・コール氏の寄稿です。

item.title: 「これ描いて死ね」アニメ放送記念 マンガ家9人の応援イラスト＆コメント（コメントあり） https://natalie…
item.author: コミックナタリー (@comic.natalie.mu)
item.description:
「これ描いて死ね」アニメ放送記念　マンガ家9人の応援イラスト＆コメント（コメントあり）
https://natalie.mu/comic/news/678943?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

山本崇一朗、諸星大二郎、皆川亮二、藤田和日郎、西森博之、高橋留美子、島本和彦、あだち充、青山剛昌が参加

#これ描いて

item.title: Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda on Thursday said the Ba…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda on Thursday said the Baltic country’s top political leaders had agreed that a constitutional ban on the domestic deployment of nuclear weapons should be removed.

Read more: cnb.cx/4oWFb8I
item.content:encoded:
Lithuanian President Gitanas Nauseda on Thursday said the Baltic country’s top political leaders had agreed that a constitutional ban on the domestic deployment of nuclear weapons should be removed.

Read more: cnb.cx/4oWFb8I

item.title: 彼女の世界に音はなく、謎ばかりがあった。新潮ミステリー大賞優秀賞受賞作。 名探偵・斑猫雪羽の遺児、斑猫キリカ。ミステリ…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
彼女の世界に音はなく、謎ばかりがあった。新潮ミステリー大賞優秀賞受賞作。

名探偵・斑猫雪羽の遺児、斑猫キリカ。ミステリ作家志望の岩崎理人は、聴覚障害を抱えるキリカと怪しげな実験に参加するため孤島へと渡る。無視される懊悩、届かない無力さ。痛みを知らないひとに探偵は務まらない。巨匠エラリー・クイーンが生んだ聾の名探偵ドルリー・レーンに捧ぐ、本格愛に満ちた孤島ミステリ!

九能式尚
『名探偵の君へ』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
彼女の世界に音はなく、謎ばかりがあった。新潮ミステリー大賞優秀賞受賞作。

名探偵・斑猫雪羽の遺児、斑猫キリカ。ミステリ作家志望の岩崎理人は、聴覚障害を抱えるキリカと怪しげな実験に参加するため孤島へと渡る。無視される懊悩、届かない無力さ。痛みを知らないひとに探偵は務まらない。巨匠エラリー・クイーンが生んだ聾の名探偵ドルリー・レーンに捧ぐ、本格愛に満ちた孤島ミステリ!

九能式尚
『名探偵の君へ』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...

item.title: Many of the babies’ autopsy reports were clear: Vitamin K de…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Many of the babies’ autopsy reports were clear: Vitamin K deficiency was the immediate cause of death, or contributed to it.

The reports also included details about parents refusing the vitamin K shot, a long-standard injection, for their newborns.

(Published May)
item.content:encoded:
Many of the babies’ autopsy reports were clear: Vitamin K deficiency was the immediate cause of death, or contributed to it.

The reports also included details about parents refusing the vitamin K shot, a long-standard injection, for their newborns.

(Published May)

item.title: Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a …
item.author: Jen (@jen-notjenny.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a cave.

It's not really that deep.

Grab your cup and let's get it!
item.content:encoded:
Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a cave.

item.title: Beavers: 1. Flooding: 0. Our West London Beavers are still …
item.author: Mayor of London, Sadiq Khan (@london.gov.uk)
item.description:
Beavers: 1. Flooding: 0.

Our West London Beavers are still helping reduce flood risk and restoring nature, all while growing their family - with more kits born this year.

Any name suggestions for the new arrivals? 👀
item.content:encoded:
Beavers: 1. Flooding: 0.

Our West London Beavers are still helping reduce flood risk and restoring nature, all while growing their family - with more kits born this year.

Any name suggestions for the new arrivals? 👀

item.title: HOLY SHIT. FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA g…
item.author: Eliza Orlins (@elizaorlins.bsky.social)
item.description:
HOLY SHIT.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA game, sitting with Howard Lutnick, Secretary of Commerce AND CLOSE PERSONAL FRIEND OF JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

Disgusting.
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA game, sitting with Howard Lutnick, Secretary of Commerce AND CLOSE PERSONAL FRIEND OF JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

Disgusting.

item.title: Hey you. Yeah, you reading this. I hope your July is better…
item.author: C. Robert Cargill (@crobertcargill.bsky.social)
item.description:
Hey you. Yeah, you reading this.

I hope your July is better than your June. I hope that thing you're worried about works itself out for the best. I hope they text back. I hope you find that $20 you forgot about in a pocket right when you need it most.

I just really hope things for you get better.
item.content:encoded:
Hey you. Yeah, you reading this.

I hope your July is better than your June. I hope that thing you're worried about works itself out for the best. I hope they text back. I hope you find that $20 you forgot about in a pocket right when you need it most.

I just really hope things for you get better.

item.title: Here is your Canadian moment for this evening
item.author: James Harbeck (@sesquiotic.bsky.social)
item.description: Here is your Canadian moment for this evening
item.content:encoded: Here is your Canadian moment for this evening

item.title: Ik houd van positief nieuws! In Europa zijn vorig jaar 603…
item.author: Jolanda Pikkaart 📷📚👒 (@jolandapikkaart.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ik houd van positief nieuws!

In Europa zijn vorig jaar 603 rivier barrières verwijderd, waardoor meer dan 3700 kilometer rivier weer vrijer kan stromen. Goed nieuws voor vissen, waterkwaliteit en natuurlijke dynamiek

#natuur
item.content:encoded:
Ik houd van positief nieuws!

In Europa zijn vorig jaar 603 rivier barrières verwijderd, waardoor meer dan 3700 kilometer rivier weer vrijer kan stromen. Goed nieuws voor vissen, waterkwaliteit en natuurlijke dynamiek

#natuur

item.title: He reads so fast and wants to turn the page.

item.description: He reads so fast and wants to turn the page.
item.content:encoded: He reads so fast and wants to turn the page.

item.title: Saying good night to my BlueSky friends with this incredible…
item.author: Carole with an e (@crwright.bsky.social)
item.description: Saying good night to my BlueSky friends with this incredible sight. On June 31, a rare 22-degree solar halo appeared above Devils Tower in Wyoming. The ring formed as sunlight passed through millions of tiny hexagonal ice crystals, creating one of nature's most beautiful optical displays.
item.content:encoded: Saying good night to my BlueSky friends with this incredible sight. On June 31, a rare 22-degree solar halo appeared above Devils Tower in Wyoming. The ring formed as sunlight passed through millions of tiny hexagonal ice crystals, creating one of nature's most beautiful optical displays.
